paragraphs: Operating quietly in the heart of downtown Tokyo, Wanted Minds is a private detective agency known for navigating the shadows where answers are rarely obvious. Focused on crime scene investigation, missing persons, and digital crime, Wanted Minds blends sharp intuition with advanced technology.

Our agency is built on the belief that every mystery leaves a footprint, whether physical or digital. We have refined a unique edge of advanced technology. Our investigators are as comfortable scouring a physical crime scene for microscopic evidence as they are navigating the complex layers of the encrypted web to trace a digital trail.
